items.title: Make the mobile loop a real General Manager decision deck
items.insight: The mobile overlay already compresses the franchise into a single-column view, but its action row is static and misses the highest-pressure next decision. A narrow beta tester should see the next meaningful General Manager move immediately: draft board, injury triage, cap cleanup, trade deadline, or advance week.
items.recipe: Add a pure buildMobileDecisionDeck() helper that derives two to three prioritized mobile actions from phase, week, cap, injuries, draft, roster needs, and news; render those actions in renderMobileOverlay(); add focused tests for draft, cap/injury, and default advance-week states.
items.evidence: public/lib/mobileLoop.js currently renders only Advance Week and Full View buttons; it reads phase, cap, injuries, roster needs, and news but does not translate them into decision priorities.

L1.recipe: Create buildMobileDecisionDeck() with draft, cap/injury, and default advance-week priorities, then export it for unit tests.

L2.recipe: Wire buildMobileDecisionDeck() into renderMobileOverlay(), render the top decision cards with data-action attributes, and test draft, cap/injury, and default states.

L3.recipe: Add action routing that can switch to Draft, Contracts, Roster, or Overview tabs when the mobile decision card is tapped, while retaining the current advance-week callback.

items.title: Attach a compact franchise fingerprint to beta feedback
items.insight: The beta issue URL now carries launch readiness, but it still loses the franchise state that explains why a report matters. A privacy-safe fingerprint with team, record, cap posture, top roster need, and active pressure lets feedback be triaged as gameplay balance, roster logic, or deployment friction without analytics or accounts.
items.recipe: Add buildFeedbackContextFingerprint() as a pure helper, include optional fingerprint lines in buildFeedbackIssueUrl(), gather the snapshot in openFeedback(), and test that the body includes gameplay context without tokens, emails, or save payloads.
items.evidence: public/lib/betaFeedback.js gathers season, week, phase, screen, runtime, and readiness rows, but no team record, cap posture, roster need, or active pressure context.

L1.recipe: Add buildFeedbackContextFingerprint() and pure URL-builder tests for team, record, cap, need, and pressure lines.

L2.recipe: Gather the fingerprint from state.dashboard/newsRows in openFeedback(), attach it to the issue body, and verify no secret-like or save-payload fields leak.

L3.recipe: Add a compact fingerprint preview in the Settings feedback panel so beta users can see exactly what public-safe context will be attached.

items.title: Backfill missing closeout protocol scripts locally
items.insight: Startup has repo-local shims, but closeout still references missing cost and impact-brief scripts, which makes every session carry avoidable protocol drift. Public-safe local shims keep the documented /closeout surface executable while private Studio OS remains the source of deeper operations.
items.recipe: Add scripts/record-skill-cost.mjs and scripts/render-closeout-brief.mjs with public-safe behavior, wire tests that both scripts load and emit/write expected artifacts, and keep outputs secret-redacted and local to .cache/docs.
items.evidence: node scripts/record-skill-cost.mjs and node scripts/render-closeout-brief.mjs currently fail with MODULE_NOT_FOUND, while studio-closeout requires both.

L1.recipe: Add minimal no-secret local shims that accept the documented flags and write deterministic .cache/docs artifacts.

L2.recipe: Add node:test coverage for start/step/finish cost records and closeout brief rendering from JSON input.

L3.recipe: Integrate the shims into ops/studio smoke coverage and include diff-stat and honesty-ledger fields when present.

skipped.reason: Still requires Cloudflare/GitHub org-root capability that is missing from this repo; keep it surfaced as an agent-attemptable blocker with the existing runbook.
Best deferred until beta feedback produces real decision traces; otherwise the critique model would invent player habits.

executionLog.evidence: Added buildMobileDecisionDeck(), rendered prioritized mobile decision cards in the overlay, routed cards to existing tabs or advance-week, and covered draft/cap-injury/default states. Focused mobile tests pass 3/3; runtime shard passes 79/79.

Added buildFeedbackContextFingerprint(), attached team/record/cap/top-need/pressure rows to beta issue URLs, gathered the fingerprint from live state, and verified no secret-like/save payload fields leak. Focused beta feedback tests pass 6/6; runtime shard passes 79/79.
Added public-safe record-skill-cost and render-closeout-brief shims with temporary-directory renderer coverage. Studio protocol shard passes 5/5.
